headline: Why Brown & Brown (BRO) Stock Is Down Today
summary: Shares of insurance brokerage firm Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) fell 2.6% in the morning session after Morgan Stanley downgraded the stock to "Underweight" from "Equalweight" and lowered its price target.

headline: Morgan Stanley Downgrades Brown & Brown to Underweight, Lowers Price Target to $55
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Bob Huang   downgrades Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) from Equal-Weight to Underweight and lowers the price target from $60 to $55.
